tests.name: source-material-review
tests.command_or_action: render and inspect both PDFs, extract full PDF text, and read both TXT files as UTF-8
tests.evidence: all four supplied source documents were readable

tests.name: four-person-role-consistency
tests.command_or_action: assert the A1/person 1, A2/person 2, B/person 3 and C/person 4 mappings and scan for stale current-two-person wording
tests.evidence: the four-person, three-thread mapping is consistent and no forbidden stale wording remains

tests.name: relative-markdown-links
tests.command_or_action: resolve every relative Markdown link and test its target path

tests.name: github-markdown-render
tests.command_or_action: GitHub Markdown API for README.md, docs/TEAM_RESPONSIBILITIES.md and docs/API_CONTRACT.md
tests.evidence: all three documents rendered without API errors

tests.name: credential-pattern-scan
tests.command_or_action: scan staged files for common GitHub, OpenAI, AWS and private-key patterns

not_run: Client, backend, Live2D, TTS, ASR and server deployment tests were not run because this change contains no implementation code.
risks: The shared API contract still requires confirmation from persons 1, 2, 3 and 4 before implementation.
The four-server target topology has been restored from the master plan, but person 4 must still verify actual resources and runtime behavior.
open_items: Pull Request #1 is not merged, so main does not yet contain these documents.
Project license, production asset authorization and upstream integration method remain undecided.
next_steps: Repository owner reviews and decides whether to merge Pull Request #1.
Persons 1, 2, 3 and 4 confirm their responsibilities and API_CONTRACT.md v0.1.
Create separate Phase 1 tasks for the A1, A2, B and C minimum demonstrations.
